assertions.rationale: Duende User Management is a new product not in general LLM training data.

assertions.assertion: Adds Duende.Storage.Sqlite NuGet package (or references it)
assertions.rationale: Duende.Storage.Sqlite is a Duende-specific package not in general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddUserManagement() on the IdentityServer builder with a configuration lambda
assertions.rationale: AddUserManagement() is a Duende-specific extension method not in general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddSqliteStore() inside the AddUserManagement options lambda (not at top level)
assertions.rationale: The specific nested configuration pattern is Duende-specific.

assertions.assertion: Calls IDatabaseSchema.CreateIfNotExistsAsync() to ensure database schema exists
assertions.rationale: IDatabaseSchema is a Duende-specific interface not in general knowledge.
